title: Deeper Caves Silk Touch Fix
description: Fixes ore blocks and slate not dropping with Silk Touch. From the Deeper Caves mod.
body:
Fix for [Deeper Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeper_caves).

The ores and Slate block have incorrect loot tables. Not only do they only drop 1 under all circumstances, but Silk Touch does not work. Here is the fix for it.
